title: Traffic alert: Road closures set for Sunday’s Step Up 4 Kids 5K, fun run in Syracuse
summary: McMahon Ryan Child Advocacy Center's Step Up 4 Kids 5K event will cause street closures around Leavenworth Park on Sunday morning (9:00-9:30 a.m.). The city has coordinated traffic management for this community event, affecting perimeter roads around the park.
